title: salix marrubiifolia
intro: Salix marrubiifolia, also known as Marrubium willd., is a plant species belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Salix marrubiifolia include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Salix marrubiifolia is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves and flowers are used in herbal preparations to make remedies for various health conditions.
